cases.title: TS-20: Mobile web check-in via POST /check-in marks Present within 2 s
preconditions: Active session with valid room GPS (10.762622, 106.660172) and gpsRadiusMeters 100
Enrolled Student authenticated with valid session cookie (mobile web client context)
Valid unexpired QrToken extracted from qrPayload wecheck://check-in?token=uuid&session=uuid
Student coordinates within radius (10.762700, 106.660200)
Student attendance status is Pending for session
TestClock within attendance window (scheduledStart + 10 min)
steps: Record wall-clock start time before POST /api/v1/check-in
POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId from scanned QR payload, latitude 10.762700, longitude 106.660200, spoofMetadata.platform android using Student session
Assert HTTP status 200
Assert response outcome Success and message Điểm danh thành công
Assert response attendance.status Present and checkedInAt is ISO 8601 UTC timestamp
Assert elapsed wall-clock time from request start to response ≤ 2000 ms under normal network
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance and assert student status Present
Query qr_tokens for tokenId and assert status Consumed
cases.expected: FR-07 satisfied: authenticated student submits token from QR scan; attendance Present; confirmation within 2 s per NFR-04; no native app required

cases.title: TS-21: Non-enrolled student mobile check-in rejected with no Present record
preconditions: Active session for class HESD-01 / subject SWE-101 exists
Authenticated Student B exists but is not enrolled in session class-subject pair
Valid unexpired QrToken from GET /sessions/:sessionId/qr/current qrPayload
Student B coordinates within session gpsRadiusMeters
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId from QR payload and in-radius coordinates using Student B session
Assert HTTP status 403
Assert response outcome NotEnrolled and errorCode NotEnrolled
Query attendance_records for Student B and sessionId and assert status is not Present
Verify CheckInAttempt row logged with outcome NotEnrolled
cases.expected: Check-in rejected for non-enrolled student per AC-07b; no Present attendance created; FR-07 submission path fails at enrollment guard

cases.title: CheckInService.submit atomically marks Present and consumes QrToken in PostgreSQL transaction
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database is running
Active session row with enrollment and Pending attendance_records row for studentId
Valid qr_tokens row with status Valid for sessionId (tokenId matches QR payload)
CheckInService wired to AttendanceService and QrTokenRepository with serializable isolation
steps: Record beforeState: attendance status Pending, qr_token status Valid
Invoke CheckInService.submit(tokenId, locationPayload, studentId) with in-radius coordinates
Query attendance_records for sessionId and studentId
Query qr_tokens for tokenId
Query check_in_attempts for latest attempt and assert outcome Success
cases.expected: Single transaction per domain model §5.2: attendance transitions to Present with checkedInAt set; qr_token status Consumed; CheckInAttempt logged per FR-07 check-in pipeline

cases.title: Successful mobile check-in transitions Attendance Pending to Present and QrToken Valid to Consumed
preconditions: Pending attendance_records row in PostgreSQL for enrolled studentId and Active sessionId
Valid qr_tokens row with status Valid linked to sessionId
CheckInService.submit callable with TestClock fixed within token TTL and attendance window
steps: Record beforeState Attendance Pending and QrToken Valid from database
Invoke CheckInService.submit with tokenId from QR payload and in-radius locationPayload
Query attendance_records and assert afterState Present with non-null checkedInAt
Query qr_tokens and assert afterState Consumed
Verify state machine guards per 07-state-machines.md SM-02 and SM-03
cases.expected: beforeState Pending/Valid; afterState Present/Consumed; FR-07 successful check-in updates attendance status to Present on success

cases.title: POST /check-in returns 200 with Success outcome and attendance DTO for valid mobile submission
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student session cookie is set
Active sessionId with Valid QrToken and student Pending attendance
tokenId extracted from qrPayload wecheck://check-in?token=uuid&session=uuid
steps: Send POST /api/v1/check-in with body { tokenId, latitude: 10.762700, longitude: 106.660200, spoofMetadata: { mockLocationDetected: false, platform: "android" } }
Assert HTTP status 200
Assert Content-Type application/json; charset=utf-8
Assert response body contains outcome Success, message Điểm danh thành công
Assert response body attendance object contains status Present and checkedInAt ISO 8601 UTC string
Assert no errorCode field present on success envelope per API design §6.2
cases.expected: HTTP 200 Success contract per API design §6.2; structured success response for mobile web client after QR token submission

cases.title: POST /check-in for not-enrolled student returns 403 NotEnrolled envelope
preconditions: Authenticated Student session for user not enrolled in target session
Valid unexpired QrToken from scanned QR deep link
In-radius coordinates supplied in request body
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with valid tokenId and coordinates using non-enrolled Student session
Assert HTTP status 403
Assert response body outcome NotEnrolled and errorCode NotEnrolled
Assert response body contains localized Vietnamese enrollment or permission message
Verify CheckInAttempt row inserted with outcome NotEnrolled
cases.expected: HTTP 403 NotEnrolled per API design §6.3; canonical failure envelope; no Present attendance per FR-07 failure path

cases.title: Instructor denied POST /check-in with 403 Forbidden (lacks checkin:submit)
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor session is available
Active session with valid QrToken exists
Instructor role lacks checkin:submit permission per roles-permissions §2.2
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with valid tokenId and in-radius coordinates using Instructor session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden
Assert response errorCode Forbidden with localized permission-denied message
Verify no attendance record for instructor userId transitions to Present
cases.expected: Only Student role holds checkin:submit; FR-07 check-in restricted to Student actor; Instructor attempt denied with HTTP 403

cases.title: TrainingOfficeAdmin denied POST /check-in with 403 Forbidden
preconditions: Authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin session is available
Active session with valid QrToken and enrolled student context exists
Admin role lacks checkin:submit per roles-permissions §2.2 matrix
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with valid tokenId and coordinates using TrainingOfficeAdmin session
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden and errorCode Forbidden
Assert no Present attendance created for admin userId
cases.expected: checkin:submit restricted to Student role per FR-07 actor specification; admin cannot submit check-in via student endpoint

cases.title: Not-enrolled student check-in boundary: 403 NotEnrolled and attendance remains non-Present
preconditions: Two students: Student A enrolled in session, Student B authenticated but not enrolled
Same Active session with separate Valid QrToken fixtures
Both students have in-radius GPS coordinates
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in as Student A with tokenId and assert HTTP 200 outcome Success (control: enrolled path works)
Issue fresh Valid token for second assertion
POST /api/v1/check-in as Student B with new tokenId and in-radius coordinates
Assert HTTP 403 with outcome NotEnrolled
Query attendance for Student B and sessionId and assert status is not Present
cases.expected: Enrollment boundary enforced at Layer 4 per validation-rules §5.1 step 9; enrolled succeeds, non-enrolled rejected without Present

cases.title: Flow A step 4: Enrolled student POST /check-in after QR poll completes workshop check-in
preconditions: Flow A steps 1–3 complete: roster seeded, session opened Active, QR token polled via GET /sessions/:id/qr/current
Authenticated enrolled Student session established (login with returnUrl preserving deep link)
Student coordinates within session radius
tokenId extracted from qrPayload returned in step 3
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId from Flow A step 3, latitude 10.762700, longitude 106.660200 using Student session
Assert HTTP 200 outcome Success with attendance Present
Instructor GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance and assert present count incremented by 1
Verify tokenId status Consumed in database
cases.expected: Flow A happy-path mobile check-in step succeeds per testing-plan §6 Flow A; FR-07 validated end-to-end in workshop lifecycle

cases.title: CheckInService persists CheckInAttempt row with Success outcome on every successful submission
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with Active session, enrollment, Valid QrToken, Pending attendance
check_in_attempts table accessible for inspection
steps: Count check_in_attempts rows for sessionId and studentId before submit
Invoke CheckInService.submit with valid tokenId and in-radius payload
Query newest check_in_attempts row for sessionId and studentId
Assert outcome Success, studentId matches, tokenId matches, submittedAt populated
Assert raw latitude/longitude not persisted in attendance_records per NFR-12
cases.expected: Every check-in attempt logged per checkin-qr module §2.4; Success outcome recorded alongside Present attendance per FR-07 outputs

cases.title: Unauthenticated POST /check-in returns 401 Unauthenticated before check-in recorded
preconditions: No session cookie or Authorization header present
Active session with valid QrToken and tokenId from QR payload available
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with valid tokenId, latitude 10.762700, longitude 106.660200 and no auth credentials
Assert HTTP status 401
Assert response outcome Unauthenticated and errorCode Unauthenticated
Verify no attendance record transitions to Present for any student
cases.expected: FR-07 requires authenticated student session; unauthenticated API call returns 401 Unauthenticated per BR-06 and validation pipeline step 2

cases.title: Mobile web QR scan check-in journey: camera scan → GPS capture → Vietnamese success confirmation
preconditions: Authenticated Student logged in on mobile viewport 375×812
Active session with instructor QR displayed; valid qrPayload wecheck://check-in?token=uuid&session=uuid
Browser geolocation mocked or granted with in-radius coordinates (10.762700, 106.660200)
Device camera permission granted for QR scanner component
steps: Student opens /check-in on mobile viewport and taps Quét mã QR or uses camera scanner
Scan QR code encoding wecheck://check-in deep link and verify client extracts tokenId from payload
Verify check-in page loads with session context and GPS permission prompt or status indicator
Grant location permission and wait for coordinates capture
Tap Xác nhận điểm danh submit control
Verify success panel displays Điểm danh thành công with Present status and checked-in timestamp in vi-VN locale
cases.expected: FR-07 mobile web QR scan flow complete without native app; Vietnamese UI copy; token extracted from QR payload and submitted with authenticated identity

cases.title: Mobile check-in confirmation UI appears within 2 seconds of submit tap
preconditions: Authenticated Student on mobile viewport with GPS permission granted
Active session and valid unexpired token deep-linked to /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId
Network throttling disabled (normal network profile)
steps: Navigate to /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId on mobile viewport
Record timestamp T0 immediately before clicking Xác nhận điểm danh submit button
Click submit after GPS coordinates captured
Wait for success confirmation element (Điểm danh thành công or Present badge)
Record timestamp T1 when success UI visible
Assert T1 minus T0 ≤ 2000 ms
cases.expected: User-visible confirmation within 2 s under normal network per FR-07 and NFR-04; server-authoritative outcome reflected in UI

cases.title: iOS 15+ Safari mobile check-in: QR scan and GPS submit succeeds without native app
preconditions: Playwright emulates iPhone 12+ with iOS 15+ Safari user-agent
Authenticated enrolled Student session on mobile viewport
Active session with valid check-in deep link wecheck://check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId
Geolocation mocked with in-radius coordinates
steps: Navigate to /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId on iOS Safari emulation
Verify page renders without horizontal scroll at 375px width
Grant geolocation permission via browser context override
Submit check-in and verify success panel Điểm danh thành công
Verify no app store or native app install prompt appears
cases.expected: FR-07 platform target iOS 15+ Safari supported; mobile web only per MVP scope §7.3; no native app install required

cases.title: Android 10+ Chrome mobile check-in: QR deep link and GPS submit succeeds
preconditions: Playwright emulates Android mid-range device with Chrome user-agent (Android 10+)
Authenticated enrolled Student session on mobile viewport 360×640
Active session with valid token deep link
Geolocation mocked with in-radius coordinates and spoofMetadata.platform android
steps: Navigate to /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId on Android Chrome emulation
Verify all UI labels and messages render in Vietnamese (vi-VN)
Grant geolocation permission and submit check-in
Verify success confirmation Điểm danh thành công with Present status
Verify page usable without native Android app
cases.expected: FR-07 platform target Android 10+ Chrome supported per functional requirements traceability; mobile web check-in without native app

cases.title: Mobile check-in page shows enrollment error when student not enrolled in session
preconditions: Authenticated Student B not enrolled in target session on mobile viewport 375px width
Valid check-in deep link with tokenId and sessionId for Active session
GPS permission granted with in-radius coordinates
steps: Student B opens /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId
Complete GPS capture and submit check-in
Verify error panel displays localized not-enrolled message (NotEnrolled outcome) in Vietnamese
Verify no success confirmation or Present badge shown
Verify student can navigate back or retry with valid enrollment context
cases.expected: Non-enrolled student sees rejection in mobile web UI per AC-07b; FR-07 failure surfaced with vi-VN copy

cases.title: QR deep link from scan opens login redirect then returns to check-in after auth
preconditions: Unauthenticated student opens scanned QR deep link on mobile browser
Active session with valid token in QR payload wecheck://check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId
Student account exists with valid credentials
steps: Navigate to /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId without session cookie on mobile viewport
Verify redirect to /login with returnUrl preserving check-in query params
Complete login with valid student credentials
Verify redirect back to /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId with session established
Complete GPS capture and submit; verify Điểm danh thành công success confirmation
cases.expected: Mobile QR scan flow integrates auth gate per BR-06; student completes FR-07 check-in after login without re-scanning QR

cases.title: Check-in page UI copy is Vietnamese (vi-VN) for labels, buttons, and outcome messages
preconditions: Authenticated Student on mobile viewport
Active session with valid token deep link to /check-in page
Application locale set to vi-VN default
steps: Navigate to /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId
Verify page title, GPS prompt text, and submit button use Vietnamese copy (e.g. Xác nhận điểm danh)
Submit successful check-in and verify success message Điểm danh thành công
Verify no English-only user-facing strings on primary check-in flow controls
cases.expected: FR-07 specifies UI copy is Vietnamese (vi-VN); all primary check-in flow strings localized per NFR-17

cases.title: Client tokenId from qrPayload deep link resolves to Valid QrToken row for CheckInService.submit
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with Active session and Valid qr_tokens row
qrPayload string wecheck://check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId matches database tokenId
Enrolled studentId with Pending attendance
steps: Parse tokenId from qrPayload deep link format per API design §6.1
Invoke CheckInService.submit(parsedTokenId, locationPayload, studentId)
Assert CheckInResult outcome Success
Query qr_tokens where id equals parsedTokenId and assert status Consumed
cases.expected: FR-07 client extracts token from QR payload; parsed tokenId binds to one-time-use session token consumed on successful check-in
